info.name: ExpenseFlow — Complete API
info.description:
Collection lengkap semua endpoint ExpenseFlow.

Cara pakai:
1. php artisan migrate:fresh --seed && php artisan serve
2. php artisan queue:work  (wajib untuk OCR)
3. Jalankan request Login di folder Auth sesuai role yang dibutuhkan.
   Token tersimpan otomatis ke variabel koleksi.
4. Lanjut request lain. ID hasil create tersimpan otomatis.

Variabel koleksi: base_url, token_hrd, token_finance, token_admin, token_emp,
  emp_id, receipt_id, vendor_id, invoice_id, user_id,
  setting_id, leave_id, holiday_id, notification_id.

item.name: Login gagal — password salah (rate limit test)
02. Employee — Struk (Receipt)
item.description: Middleware: auth:sanctum + role:employee + company + receipt_access. Gunakan token_emp.

item.name: 03. Dashboard — Struk Approval (Finance/Admin)
item.description: Middleware: auth:sanctum + role:finance,admin,super_admin + company. Gunakan token_finance atau token_admin.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "PT Maju Supplier",
  "email": "supplier@majusupplier.co.id",
  "phone": "02112345678",
  "address": "Jl. Sudirman No. 10, Jakarta",
  "contact_person": "Andi Supplier",
  "tax_id": "01.234.567.8-901.000",
  "bank_name": "BCA",
  "bank_account_no": "1234567890",
  "bank_account_name": "PT Maju Supplier"
}

item.name: 10. HRD — Dashboard Presensi
item.description: Middleware: auth:sanctum + role:hrd,admin,super_admin + company. Gunakan token_hrd.

item.name: 11. HRD — Pengaturan Kantor (Attendance Settings)
item.description: CRUD lokasi & jam kerja kantor. Middleware: auth:sanctum + role:hrd,admin,super_admin + company.

item.name: Update kantor — aktifkan early leave (30 menit)
12. HRD — Kalender Libur
item.description: Kelola libur nasional & libur perusahaan. Middleware: auth:sanctum + role:hrd,admin,super_admin + company.

item.name: Update libur (ubah tanggal/nama — nasional bisa diedit)
13. Employee — Presensi Mobile
item.description: Middleware check-in/out: auth:sanctum + company + attendance_access (wfh_enabled=true). Riwayat & cuti tidak butuh attendance_access.

item.name: Check-in ditolak — di luar radius (lapangan mode)
Check-in ditolak — wfh_enabled=false (harus via perangkat kantor)
14. HRD — Approval Lembur
item.description: Setiap checkout lembur (manual/auto) wajib disetujui HRD sebelum masuk payroll. Middleware: auth:sanctum + role:hrd,admin,super_admin + company.

item.name: 15. HRD — Approval Pindah Perangkat
item.description: Karyawan login dari HP baru otomatis membuat permintaan pending. HRD approve agar token HP lama dicabut (cegah titip absen). Middleware: auth:sanctum + role:hrd,admin,super_admin + company.

item.name: Approve pindah perangkat (token HP lama dicabut)
16. HRD — Dokumen Surat Izin/Cuti
item.description: Download file dokumen surat izin/cuti yang diupload karyawan. Middleware: auth:sanctum + role:hrd,admin,super_admin + company.

item.name: 17. HRD — Custom Shift / Scheduling
item.description: Manajemen shift kerja custom per karyawan & cabang. Override jam kerja global kantor (mis. masuk Sabtu/Minggu). Middleware: auth:sanctum + role:hrd,admin,super_admin + company. CATATAN: jalankan 'Buat shift' dulu agar shift_id terisi, lalu 'Assign shift' untuk mengisi assignment_id. Butuh setting_id (cabang) — ambil dari folder 11.

item.name: Buat template shift (Shift Sabtu) — simpan shift_id

exec: if (d && d.id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('shift_id', d.id); console.log('shift_id=' + d.id); }

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Shift Sabtu",
  "description": "Masuk Senin-Jumat normal + Sabtu 09:00-15:00, Minggu libur",
  "is_active": true,
  "attendance_setting_id": {{setting_id}},
  "schedules": [
    { "day_of_week": 0, "is_off": true },
    { "day_of_week": 1, "is_off": false, "work_start_time": "08:00", "work_end_time": "17:00" },
    { "day_of_week": 2, "is_off": false, "work_start_time": "08:00", "work_end_time": "17:00" },
    { "day_of_week": 3, "is_off": false, "work_start_time": "08:00", "work_end_time": "17:00" },
    { "day_of_week": 4, "is_off": false, "work_start_time": "08:00", "work_end_time": "17:00" },
    { "day_of_week": 5, "is_off": false, "work_start_time": "08:00", "work_end_time": "17:00" },
    { "day_of_week": 6, "is_off": false, "work_start_time": "09:00", "work_end_time": "15:00" }
  ]
}

item.name: Update template shift (ubah nama & jam Sabtu)
Assign shift ke karyawan — simpan assignment_id
Assign shift = null (kembali ke default kantor)
Bulk assign — 1 shift ke banyak karyawan
Roster — shift aktif karyawan hari ini
Hapus template shift (diblokir bila masih dipakai)
